name: NeurIPS 2026 — ML for Health Workshop
notes: Premier ML conference. Health workshop directly relevant to NOOS AI validation.

name: AMIA 2026 Annual Symposium
notes: Clinical informatics — key venue for NOOS SaMD regulatory discussions.

name: IEEE Symposium on Security & Privacy (Oakland) 2026
notes: Top security venue. Differential privacy and consent tech papers.

name: PoPETs / PETS 2026
notes: Premier privacy-enhancing tech symposium. Core ÆLYA research community.

name: ACM Conference on Economics & Computation (EC) 2026
notes: Data pricing and mechanism design — directly relevant to MYNε.

name: The Web Conference (WWW) 2026
notes: Web economy and data governance. MYNε market design presentations.

name: CRYPTO 2026
notes: Premier cryptography conference. Post-quantum and ZK proof advances.

name: Real World Crypto 2027
notes: Applied cryptography — implementation-focused. BURHAN engineering team should attend.

name: ACL 2026
notes: Premier NLP venue. RAG, knowledge graphs, and LLM fine-tuning papers.

name: AAAI 2026
notes: Broad AI conference — knowledge engineering and cognitive science tracks.

name: AAMAS 2026 — Autonomous Agents & Multi-Agent Systems
notes: Premier multi-agent systems venue. Core RAQIB research community.

name: ACM SIGSPATIAL 2026
notes: Geospatial AI — RAQIB territorial intelligence and satellite analysis.

name: Consensus 2026
notes: Leading blockchain/crypto conference. CBDC, DeFi, and cross-border settlement.

name: Money20/20 Europe 2026
notes: Fintech payments conference. MIZAN cross-border settlement showcase opportunity.

name: ZK Summit 2026
notes: Focused ZK proof conference. BURHAN ZK infrastructure development.
